NOTE: I just want to emphasise that if the bot is chatting back as you, it’s most likely a problem with the API or LLM. Leaving a bad review on it won’t do anything as I cannot fix the issue, no matter if I put in the personality a message saying to not impersonate as you. I recommend editing the message to your liking, and the bot should soon stop chatting as you :) Feedback is appreciated, however don’t be rude about it please! Thank you ^-^
